creator: girgen@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 236539
fix dependency problem for qt5.gui

When building qt-gui port with the X11 option = off, it still requires libGL.so from graphics/libglvnd, but that port will not build libGL.so unless X11 = on.

With my suggested adjustment:

X11 = on

$ make -V LIB_DEPENDS | tr ' ' '\n' | grep GL.so
libEGL.so:graphics/libglvnd
libGL.so:graphics/libglvnd
$

X11 = off
$ make -V LIB_DEPENDS | tr ' ' '\n' | grep GL.so
libEGL.so:graphics/libglvnd
$

This will unbreak building stuff when X11 = off and some port pulls in qt-gui as a dependency.
